Michigan voter website allows you to check registered voters to see if they requested and sent in an absentee ballot. We're using the power of concentrated autism to find voters who are dead but still somehow summited absentee ballots. The best way is to find people born 1901-1904 as they would be older than the oldest person alive in the USA.

1. What can you do? Check Michigan Registered Voters:
https://michiganvoters.info/
- Can also download CSV for scripting

2. Look for birth years of 1900-1905 (ignore prior to 1900, site does not support)

3. Check records to see if they filed an absentee ballot, you may have to brute force the month (try all 12):

https://vote.michigan.gov/Voter/index
or
https://mvic.sos.state.mi.us/Voter/Index

Both are valid, use .gov for new screenshots because .us domains appear sketchy to some people.

IGNORE JANUARY 1900 RESULTS
A DOB of 1/1/1900 is likely due to incompetence on the part of election worker by not filling a form properly, not a dead voter.

Starting to gain traction from twitter blue checks:
https://twitter.com/fleccas/status/1324216584219623424 (embed)

Format is: First Last Month Year Zip

Known Zombies:
William Bradley March 1902 48207
Donna Brydges January 1901 49431
June Aiken August 1900 49201
